text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The way you eat is so cute, Inari. It's like you're a
squirrel or something! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Who're you callin' a squirrel?! I'm proud to be an
Umamusume and wouldn't have it any other way!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I know! Go on, eat up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Although I guess if I'm being honest, I wouldn't
mind a bit more dessert...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! I'm tryin' to look after myself. There's
no way I'm gonna cave into temptations!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: No matter how tall I get, I refuse to get any wider!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's up? Why're you so quiet all of the
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I think I'll start running in the morning for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's dedication to running tightens up
her abs.
